minimal.description: Minimal context, no LLM needed, rules-only. Instant response.
constraints: Use local rules only. Skip Ollama.

core.description: Core profile with verification loop. Good baseline.

constraints: Use evidence from the current repo before routing.
Prefer root-cause fixes and local verification.

security.description: Security-focused: OWASP checklist active on every task.
constraints: Apply OWASP Top 10 checklist to every change.
Flag issues as CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW.
Never approve hardcoded secrets or missing auth guards.

research.description: Explore-first: read and map codebase before any change.
constraints: Explore and map the codebase before suggesting any change.
Produce a written analysis before writing code.

full.description: Full — all skills active, strictest constraints. For critical tasks.
constraints: Apply all skill guidance on every task.
TDD required for any new function.
Security checklist on any auth/payment/input change.
Verify build + tests before marking complete.
Continuous learning: extract and document patterns after each task.
